item.title: Download Image Search - ImageSearchMan 3.58
item.description: ImageSearchMan is an Android application that allows users to search for images on the web using keywords or by uploading photos from their device's gallery. ImageSearchMan allows users to search for images using keywords, providing access to a huge library of images on the web. The app includes a reverse image search feature that allows users to upload photos from their device's library to find similar images or identify the source of the image. item.description: DNS Changer Android is the first layer of internet security that provides essential protection against surveillance and censorship efforts. item.title: Download CCleaner – Phone Cleaner 26.06.0 build 800011433
item.description: CCleaner is a system cleaning and optimization tool for Android devices. CCleaner for Android allows users to delete unnecessary files, such as temporary files and caches, as well as identify and uninstall applications that are taking up too much space on the device. It also includes a task kill to close running applications and free up memory. This can help free up storage space and improve device performance. In addition, CCleaner for Android also has a security feature that allows you...

item.title: Download PrintHand Mobile Print 14.9.1

This application supports direct printing from mobile devices via Wi-Fi or Bluetooth connection to the printer for printing without using an intermediary computer. This application provides many tools and features to clean and speed up your phone. One of the main features of Avast Cleanup is the Junk Cleaner, which scans your phone for unnecessary files such as temporary files, app cache, and other junk data. item.title: Download FBReader Premium 3.8.25
item.description: FBReader Premium is an e-book reading application for mobile devices. It provides a convenient way to read e-books on your phone or tablet and offers several features to enhance your reading experience. FBReader supports synchronization of your library and/or reading locations with the FBReader book network (https://books.fbreader.org/), a cloud service based on Google Drive™. Sync is disabled by default; To enable and configure it, use the options dialog. This reader also includes a...
